commands.name: download-drive-item-version-content
commands.summary: Download the binary content of a specific historical version of a OneDrive / SharePoint file. Same envelope as download-onedrive-file-content (302 → downloadUrl, or base64 bytes).

options.name: drive-id
options.description: Microsoft Graph drive ID. Use `ask-marcel list-drives` for the personal OneDrive, or `ask-marcel list-sharepoint-site-drives --site-id <id>` for a SharePoint document library.

options.name: item-id
options.description: driveItem ID of the file. Returned by `list-folder-files` or `search-onedrive-files`.

options.name: version-id
options.description: driveItemVersion ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-drive-item-versions`. Use the `id` field of an entry under `value[]`.

commands.responseShape: `{ "@microsoft.graph.downloadUrl": "..." }` for the typical 302 case, or `{ contentType, size, base64 }` when Graph streams bytes directly

commands.name: download-onedrive-file-content
commands.summary: Download the binary content of a file stored in OneDrive / SharePoint. Graph normally returns a 302 redirect to a pre-signed CDN URL, surfaced as `@microsoft.graph.downloadUrl`; if it returns bytes directly they are base64-encoded for safe JSON output.

options.name: drive-id
options.description: Microsoft Graph drive ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-drives`.

options.name: item-id
options.description: driveItem ID of the file to download. Returned by `ask-marcel list-folder-files` or `search-onedrive-files`.

commands.responseShape: `{ "@microsoft.graph.downloadUrl": "..." }` for the typical 302 case, or `{ contentType, size, base64 }` when Graph streams bytes directly

commands.name: get-calendar-event
commands.summary: Fetch a single calendar event by ID from the signed-in user’s default calendar.

options.name: event-id
options.description: Microsoft Graph event ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-calendar-events` in the `id` field of each event.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `event` resource

commands.name: get-calendar-view
commands.summary: List the signed-in user’s default-calendar events with recurrence expanded into individual occurrences in a date range. Both ISO date-time params are required by Graph.

options.name: start-date-time
options.description: ISO 8601 lower bound (UTC). Example: `2026-04-01T00:00:00Z`. Required by Graph; the request fails without it.

options.name: end-date-time
options.description: ISO 8601 upper bound (UTC). Example: `2026-05-01T00:00:00Z`. Required by Graph; the request fails without it.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `event` resources (single occurrences) under `value[]`

commands.name: get-current-user
commands.summary: Return the signed-in user’s Microsoft Graph profile (id, displayName, mail, jobTitle, etc.).
commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `user` resource

commands.name: get-drive-delta
commands.summary: Get the incremental change set (added / modified / deleted items) under a OneDrive / SharePoint folder. Use the `@odata.deltaLink` from a previous response to resume.

options.name: drive-id
options.description: Microsoft Graph drive ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-drives`.

options.name: item-id
options.description: driveItem ID of the folder whose subtree to track. Use the root folder ID from `get-drive-root-item` to track the entire drive.

commands.responseShape: collection of changed Microsoft Graph `driveItem` resources under `value[]` plus an `@odata.deltaLink` token

commands.name: get-drive-item
commands.summary: Get the metadata (driveItem resource) of a single file or folder in OneDrive / SharePoint.

options.name: drive-id
options.description: Microsoft Graph drive ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-drives`.

options.name: item-id
options.description: driveItem ID. Returned by `list-folder-files`, `search-onedrive-files`, or `get-drive-root-item`.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `driveItem` resource

commands.name: get-drive-root-item
commands.summary: Get the root folder (driveItem) of a OneDrive / SharePoint drive.

options.name: drive-id
options.description: Microsoft Graph drive ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-drives` in the `id` field.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `driveItem` resource (the root folder)

commands.name: get-excel-range
commands.summary: Get the cell values, formulas, and formats of a specific Excel range (e.g. `A1:C10`).

options.name: drive-id
options.description: Microsoft Graph drive ID containing the workbook. Returned by `ask-marcel list-drives`.

options.name: item-id
options.description: driveItem ID of the .xlsx file.

options.name: worksheet-id
options.description: Worksheet ID or worksheet name. Returned by `ask-marcel list-excel-worksheets`.

options.name: address
options.description: A1-style range address, e.g. `A1:C10` or a single cell like `B7`.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `workbookRange` resource (values, formulas, format)

commands.name: get-excel-table
commands.summary: Get the metadata (style, header row, total row) of a single named Excel table.

options.name: drive-id
options.description: Microsoft Graph drive ID containing the workbook. Returned by `ask-marcel list-drives`.

options.name: item-id
options.description: driveItem ID of the .xlsx file.

options.name: table-id
options.description: Workbook table ID or table name. Returned by `ask-marcel list-excel-tables`.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `workbookTable` resource

commands.name: get-mail-attachment
commands.summary: Get a single attachment on an Outlook message (metadata, plus the base64 `contentBytes` for file attachments).

options.name: message-id
options.description: Outlook message ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-mail-messages`.

options.name: attachment-id
options.description: Attachment ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-mail-attachments`.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `attachment` resource

commands.name: get-mail-message
commands.summary: Get a single Outlook message by ID, including subject, sender, body, and flags.

options.name: message-id
options.description: Outlook message ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-mail-messages` or `list-mail-folder-messages`.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `message` resource

commands.name: get-mailbox-settings
commands.summary: Get the signed-in user’s Outlook mailbox settings (timezone, working hours, automatic replies).
commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `mailboxSettings` resource

commands.name: get-my-profile-photo
commands.summary: Download the signed-in user’s profile photo (largest available size). Returned as a base64 envelope so the binary survives JSON output.
commands.responseShape: `{ contentType: "image/jpeg", size: <bytes>, base64: "<encoded>" }` (or `{ "@microsoft.graph.downloadUrl": "..." }` when Graph returns a 302 redirect to a CDN URL)

commands.name: get-onenote-page-content
commands.summary: Get the HTML body of a single OneNote page. Returned in a JSON envelope so the HTML survives transport.

options.name: onenote-page-id
options.description: OneNote page ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-onenote-section-pages`.

commands.responseShape: `{ contentType: "text/html", size: <chars>, text: "<html>..." }` — the rendered OneNote page body wrapped in a JSON envelope

commands.name: get-planner-bucket
commands.summary: Get the metadata of a single Microsoft Planner bucket (column / lane).

options.name: planner-bucket-id
options.description: Planner bucket ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-plan-buckets`.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `plannerBucket` resource

commands.name: get-planner-plan
commands.summary: Get the metadata of a single Microsoft Planner plan (title, owner group, container).

options.name: planner-plan-id
options.description: Planner plan ID. Returned in the `planId` field of any task from `ask-marcel list-planner-tasks`.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `plannerPlan` resource

commands.name: get-planner-task
commands.summary: Get the metadata of a single Microsoft Planner task (title, assignees, dates, completion).

options.name: planner-task-id
options.description: Planner task ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-planner-tasks` or `list-plan-tasks`.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `plannerTask` resource

commands.name: get-planner-task-details
commands.summary: Get the rich details (description, checklist, references) of a Microsoft Planner task.

options.name: planner-task-id
options.description: Planner task ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-planner-tasks` or `list-plan-tasks`.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `plannerTaskDetails` resource

commands.name: get-sharepoint-site
commands.summary: Get the metadata of a single SharePoint site by its site ID.

options.name: site-id
options.description: SharePoint site ID. Either the composite ID (`hostname,site-collection-id,site-id`) returned by `ask-marcel search-sharepoint-sites`, or the literal `root` to refer to the tenant root site.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `site` resource

commands.name: get-sharepoint-site-by-path
commands.summary: Resolve a SharePoint subsite by its server-relative path under a parent site (e.g. `/teams/marketing`).

options.name: site-id
options.description: Parent SharePoint site ID. Returned by `ask-marcel search-sharepoint-sites`, or the literal `root`.

options.name: path
options.description: Server-relative path of the subsite, including the leading slash (e.g. `/teams/marketing`).

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `site` resource

commands.name: get-sharepoint-site-drive-by-id
commands.summary: Get the metadata of a single document library (drive) on a SharePoint site by drive ID.

options.name: site-id
options.description: SharePoint site ID. Returned by `ask-marcel search-sharepoint-sites`.

options.name: drive-id
options.description: Drive (document library) ID on the site. Returned by `ask-marcel list-sharepoint-site-drives`.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `drive` resource

commands.name: get-sharepoint-site-list
commands.summary: Get the metadata (display name, template, columns) of a single SharePoint list.

options.name: site-id
options.description: SharePoint site ID. Returned by `ask-marcel search-sharepoint-sites`.

options.name: list-id
options.description: SharePoint list ID or display name. Returned by `ask-marcel list-sharepoint-site-lists`.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `list` resource

commands.name: get-sharepoint-site-list-item
commands.summary: Get a single row (listItem) of a SharePoint list by ID.

options.name: site-id
options.description: SharePoint site ID. Returned by `ask-marcel search-sharepoint-sites`.

options.name: list-id
options.description: SharePoint list ID or display name. Returned by `ask-marcel list-sharepoint-site-lists`.

options.name: list-item-id
options.description: listItem ID (typically a small integer). Returned by `ask-marcel list-sharepoint-site-list-items`.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `listItem` resource

commands.name: get-specific-calendar-event
commands.summary: Fetch a single calendar event by ID from a specific (non-default) calendar.

options.name: calendar-id
options.description: Calendar ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-calendars`.

options.name: event-id
options.description: Event ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-specific-calendar-events`.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `event` resource

commands.name: get-specific-calendar-view
commands.summary: List the events in a specific (non-default) calendar with recurrence expanded into individual occurrences in a date range. Both ISO date-time params are required by Graph.

options.name: calendar-id
options.description: Calendar ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-calendars`.

options.name: start-date-time
options.description: ISO 8601 lower bound (UTC). Example: `2026-04-01T00:00:00Z`. Required by Graph; the request fails without it.

options.name: end-date-time
options.description: ISO 8601 upper bound (UTC). Example: `2026-05-01T00:00:00Z`. Required by Graph; the request fails without it.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `event` resources (single occurrences) under `value[]`

commands.name: get-team
commands.summary: Get the metadata of a single Microsoft Team (display name, settings, member-settings, owner group).

options.name: team-id
options.description: Microsoft Teams team ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-joined-teams`.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `team` resource

commands.name: get-team-channel
commands.summary: Get the metadata of a single channel inside a Microsoft Team.

options.name: team-id
options.description: Microsoft Teams team ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-joined-teams`.

options.name: channel-id
options.description: Channel ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-team-channels`.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `channel` resource

commands.name: get-todo-task
commands.summary: Get a single Microsoft To Do task by its ID and its parent list ID.

options.name: todo-task-list-id
options.description: To Do task list ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-todo-task-lists`.

options.name: todo-task-id
options.description: To Do task ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-todo-tasks`.

commands.responseShape: single Microsoft Graph `todoTask` resource

commands.name: list-all-onenote-sections
commands.summary: List every OneNote section the signed-in user can see, across all notebooks.
commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `onenoteSection` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-calendar-event-instances
commands.summary: List the individual occurrences of a recurring calendar event over a date range. Both ISO date-time params are required by Graph.

options.name: calendar-id
options.description: Calendar ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-calendars`.

options.name: event-id
options.description: Recurring event ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-specific-calendar-events`.

options.name: start-date-time
options.description: ISO 8601 lower bound (UTC). Example: `2026-04-01T00:00:00Z`. Required by Graph; the request fails without it.

options.name: end-date-time
options.description: ISO 8601 upper bound (UTC). Example: `2026-05-01T00:00:00Z`. Required by Graph; the request fails without it.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `event` resources (single occurrences) under `value[]`

commands.name: list-calendar-events
commands.summary: List the events in the signed-in user’s default calendar (does not expand recurrences).
commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `event` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-calendar-events-delta
commands.summary: Get the incremental change set (added / modified / deleted events) for the signed-in user’s default calendar. Use the `@odata.deltaLink` from a previous response to resume.
commands.responseShape: collection of changed Microsoft Graph `event` resources under `value[]` plus an `@odata.deltaLink` token

commands.name: list-calendar-view-delta
commands.summary: Get the first page of the incremental change set of expanded calendar-view occurrences over a date range. Subsequent pages: feed the returned `@odata.nextLink` to `next-page`; resume later via the `@odata.deltaLink`.

options.name: start-date-time
options.description: ISO 8601 lower bound (UTC). Required on the first call only — the deltaLink token encodes it for resumes.

options.name: end-date-time
options.description: ISO 8601 upper bound (UTC). Required on the first call only — the deltaLink token encodes it for resumes.

commands.responseShape: collection of changed Microsoft Graph `event` occurrences under `value[]` plus an `@odata.deltaLink` token

commands.name: list-calendars
commands.summary: List the calendars in the signed-in user’s mailbox (default + secondary calendars + shared calendars).
commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `calendar` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-chat-members
commands.summary: List the members of a single Microsoft Teams chat.

options.name: chat-id
options.description: Microsoft Teams chat ID, e.g. `19:abc...@thread.v2`. This CLI does not list chats (the Teams web client token has no `Chat.Read*` scope), so the chat ID has to come from outside: the Teams desktop / web client (Open in browser → URL contains the chat thread ID), Microsoft Graph Explorer, or Power Automate.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `conversationMember` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-drive-item-permissions
commands.summary: List the sharing permissions on a OneDrive / SharePoint file or folder.

options.name: drive-id
options.description: Microsoft Graph drive ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-drives`.

options.name: item-id
options.description: driveItem ID of the file or folder. Returned by `list-folder-files`, `search-onedrive-files`, or `get-drive-item`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `permission` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-drive-item-versions
commands.summary: List the historical versions of a OneDrive / SharePoint file (each save creates a new version).

options.name: drive-id
options.description: Microsoft Graph drive ID. Use `ask-marcel list-drives` for the personal OneDrive, or `ask-marcel list-sharepoint-site-drives --site-id <id>` for a SharePoint document library.

options.name: item-id
options.description: driveItem ID of the file. Returned by `list-folder-files` or `search-onedrive-files`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `driveItemVersion` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-drives
commands.summary: List all OneDrive / SharePoint drives the signed-in user has access to.
commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `drive` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-excel-table-rows
commands.summary: List the data rows of a named Excel table (excluding the header row).

options.name: drive-id
options.description: Microsoft Graph drive ID containing the workbook. Returned by `ask-marcel list-drives`.

options.name: item-id
options.description: driveItem ID of the .xlsx file.

options.name: table-id
options.description: Workbook table ID or table name. Returned by `ask-marcel list-excel-tables`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `workbookTableRow` resources (each `values` is a 2D array) under `value[]`

commands.name: list-excel-tables
commands.summary: List the named tables across every worksheet in an Excel workbook.

options.name: drive-id
options.description: Microsoft Graph drive ID containing the workbook. Returned by `ask-marcel list-drives`.

options.name: item-id
options.description: driveItem ID of the .xlsx file. Returned by `list-folder-files` or `search-onedrive-files`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `workbookTable` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-excel-worksheets
commands.summary: List the worksheets (tabs) inside an Excel workbook stored in OneDrive / SharePoint.

options.name: drive-id
options.description: Microsoft Graph drive ID containing the workbook. Returned by `ask-marcel list-drives`.

options.name: item-id
options.description: driveItem ID of the .xlsx file. Returned by `list-folder-files` or `search-onedrive-files`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `worksheet` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-folder-files
commands.summary: List the children (files and subfolders) of a folder in OneDrive / SharePoint.

options.name: drive-id
options.description: Microsoft Graph drive ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-drives`.

options.name: item-id
options.description: driveItem ID of the folder. Use the root folder ID from `ask-marcel get-drive-root-item` to list the top of a drive.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `driveItem` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-incomplete-planner-tasks
commands.summary: List every incomplete Microsoft Planner task assigned to or owned by the signed-in user, across every plan.
commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `plannerTask` resources under `value[]` where `percentComplete < 100`

commands.name: list-incomplete-todo-tasks
commands.summary: List every incomplete Microsoft To Do task in a given list (status not equal to `completed`).

options.name: todo-task-list-id
options.description: todoTaskList ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-todo-task-lists`. Well-known names also work, e.g. `tasks` for the default list. There is no Graph endpoint that returns incomplete tasks across every list — call this once per list.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `todoTask` resources under `value[]` where `status != "completed"`

commands.name: list-joined-teams
commands.summary: List the Microsoft Teams the signed-in user is a member of.
commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `team` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-mail-attachments
commands.summary: List the attachments (file, item, reference) on a single Outlook message.

options.name: message-id
options.description: Outlook message ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-mail-messages` or `list-mail-folder-messages`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `attachment` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-mail-child-folders
commands.summary: List the subfolders of a single Outlook mail folder (e.g. subfolders of Inbox).

options.name: mail-folder-id
options.description: mailFolder ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-mail-folders`. Well-known names also work, e.g. `inbox`, `sentitems`, `drafts`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `mailFolder` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-mail-folder-messages
commands.summary: List the messages inside a specific Outlook mail folder (Inbox, custom folder, etc.).

options.name: mail-folder-id
options.description: mailFolder ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-mail-folders`. Well-known names also work, e.g. `inbox`, `sentitems`, `drafts`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `message` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-mail-folders
commands.summary: List the top-level mail folders in the signed-in user’s Outlook mailbox (Inbox, Sent Items, etc.).
commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `mailFolder` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-mail-messages
commands.summary: List the most recent messages in the signed-in user’s default Outlook inbox (no filter).
commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `message` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-mail-rules
commands.summary: List the inbox / folder rules attached to a single Outlook mail folder.

options.name: mail-folder-id
options.description: mailFolder ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-mail-folders`. Well-known names also work, e.g. `inbox`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `messageRule` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-onenote-notebook-sections
commands.summary: List the sections of a single OneNote notebook.

options.name: notebook-id
options.description: OneNote notebook ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-onenote-notebooks`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `onenoteSection` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-onenote-notebooks
commands.summary: List the OneNote notebooks owned by the signed-in user.
commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `notebook` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-onenote-section-pages
commands.summary: List the pages inside a single OneNote section.

options.name: onenote-section-id
options.description: OneNote section ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-onenote-notebook-sections` or `list-all-onenote-sections`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `onenotePage` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-plan-buckets
commands.summary: List the buckets (columns / lanes) of a Microsoft Planner plan.

options.name: planner-plan-id
options.description: Planner plan ID. Returned in the `planId` field of any task from `ask-marcel list-planner-tasks`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `plannerBucket` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-plan-tasks
commands.summary: List every task within a Microsoft Planner plan.

options.name: planner-plan-id
options.description: Planner plan ID. Returned in the `planId` field of any task from `ask-marcel list-planner-tasks`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `plannerTask` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-planner-plans
commands.summary: List every Microsoft Planner plan the signed-in user has access to (across every group). Use this to discover plan IDs without needing an existing task as the entry point.
commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `plannerPlan` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-planner-tasks
commands.summary: List every Microsoft Planner task assigned to or owned by the signed-in user, across all plans.
commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `plannerTask` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-sharepoint-site-drives
commands.summary: List the document libraries (drives) attached to a SharePoint site.

options.name: site-id
options.description: SharePoint site ID. Returned by `ask-marcel search-sharepoint-sites`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `drive` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-sharepoint-site-list-items
commands.summary: List the rows (listItem resources) of a single SharePoint list.

options.name: site-id
options.description: SharePoint site ID. Returned by `ask-marcel search-sharepoint-sites`.

options.name: list-id
options.description: SharePoint list ID or display name. Returned by `ask-marcel list-sharepoint-site-lists`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `listItem` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-sharepoint-site-lists
commands.summary: List all SharePoint lists (custom + built-in document libraries) on a site.

options.name: site-id
options.description: SharePoint site ID. Returned by `ask-marcel search-sharepoint-sites`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `list` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-specific-calendar-events
commands.summary: List the events in a specific (non-default) calendar (does not expand recurrences).

options.name: calendar-id
options.description: Calendar ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-calendars`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `event` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-team-channels
commands.summary: List the channels (standard, private, shared) inside a single Microsoft Team.

options.name: team-id
options.description: Microsoft Teams team ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-joined-teams`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `channel` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-todo-linked-resources
commands.summary: List the linked resources (URLs, emails, files) attached to a Microsoft To Do task.

options.name: todo-task-list-id
options.description: To Do task list ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-todo-task-lists`.

options.name: todo-task-id
options.description: To Do task ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-todo-tasks`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `linkedResource` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-todo-task-lists
commands.summary: List the signed-in user’s Microsoft To Do task lists (e.g. `Tasks`, `Flagged Emails`, custom lists).
commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `todoTaskList` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: list-todo-tasks
commands.summary: List the tasks in a single Microsoft To Do task list.

options.name: todo-task-list-id
options.description: To Do task list ID. Returned by `ask-marcel list-todo-task-lists`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `todoTask` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: next-page
commands.summary: Fetch the next page of a paginated Graph response. Pass the `@odata.nextLink` value returned by any list / search / delta command to walk pagination yourself.

options.name: url
options.description: Full Graph v1.0 URL — copy the `@odata.nextLink` field from the previous response. Example: `https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me/messages?$skiptoken=AKDsfg...`. Loop: keep calling until the response no longer contains `@odata.nextLink`. Also handles `@odata.deltaLink` if you want to resume a delta query.

commands.responseShape: same shape as the originating endpoint (typically `{ value: [...], "@odata.nextLink": "..." }`)

commands.name: search-mail-messages
commands.summary: Search the signed-in user’s entire Outlook mailbox using KQL or free text. Results are ranked by Graph relevance.

options.name: query
options.description: KQL or free-text query. Searches subject, body, sender, and recipients. Examples: `Q3 budget`, `from:alice@contoso.com`, `subject:invoice received>=2026-01-01`.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `message` resources under `value[]`, ranked by relevance

commands.name: search-my-documents
commands.summary: Search the signed-in user’s default OneDrive for documents matching a free-text query (filename, content, metadata).

options.name: query
options.description: Free-text search query. Matches filename, content, and metadata across the user’s personal OneDrive. Use `search-onedrive-files --drive-id <id>` instead to target a specific shared SharePoint or OneDrive drive by ID.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `driveItem` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: search-onedrive-files
commands.summary: Search a single OneDrive / SharePoint drive for files and folders matching a free-text query.

options.name: drive-id
options.description: Microsoft Graph drive ID to search inside. Returned by `ask-marcel list-drives`.

options.name: query
options.description: Free-text search query. Matches filename, content, and metadata.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `driveItem` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: search-onenote-pages
commands.summary: Find OneNote pages whose **title** contains a substring (case-sensitive). Microsoft removed full-text OneNote `?search=` from v1.0 Graph; only $filter against `title` remains.

options.name: query
options.description: Substring to look for in the OneNote page title (case-sensitive). Searches title only — full-text body search is not available on OneNote pages in v1.0 Graph. Use `list-onenote-section-pages` if you already know the section.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `onenotePage` resources under `value[]` whose title contains the query

commands.name: search-sharepoint-sites
commands.summary: List the SharePoint sites the signed-in user has access to (returns the followed sites by default).
commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `site` resources under `value[]`

commands.name: search-sharepoint-sites-by-name
commands.summary: Search the tenant for SharePoint sites whose display name or description matches a free-text query (returns up to 25).

options.name: query
options.description: Free-text query. Matches site display name and description across the tenant. Use `search-sharepoint-sites` (no query) to instead list the sites the signed-in user follows.

commands.responseShape: collection of Microsoft Graph `site` resources under `value[]` (up to 25)
